computational_feasibility: comp-012 LOW protease risk; comp-030 cassette-ranking 720 protein-distinct candidates >80 pseudo-pLDDT (full distribution: mean=88.8 std=0.5)

intrinsic_c3_convertase_decay.source: Fischer E, Kazatchkine MD 1981 (PMC2186394, J Exp Med 153(7):1671-1681). Verbatim: 'prolongs the half-life of surface-bound C4b2a from 7.5 min to greater than 5 h' — the 7.5 min value is the unaccelerated/intrinsic half-life of the classical-pathway C3 convertase at 37°C.

daf_decay_acceleration.qualitative_description: DAF accelerates dissociation of C2a from C4b2a and Bb from C3bBb; 'a large amount of C2a rapidly appeared in the supernatants and only a small amount of C2a remained on the cells' (Medof PMC2189641, 1987)
daf_decay_acceleration.source_molecules_per_cell: Medof MD, Kinoshita T, Nussenzweig V 1984 (PMC2187498) J Exp Med 160(5):1558-78. 'as few as 10(2) DAF molecules per cell profoundly inhibited the assembly of C3 and C5 convertases'.

soluble_daf_in_synovial_fluid.source: Medof MD et al. 1987 (PMC2188295) J Exp Med 165(3):848-64. Verbatim: 'we detected soluble DAF antigen in plasma, tears, saliva, and urine, as well as in synovial and cerebrospinal fluids.'

msu_surface_engagement.rationale: comp-012 explicitly: 'Whether the stalk-truncated SCR1-4 construct retains the ability to inhibit C3b deposition, accelerate CP/AP C3 convertase decay, or reduce C5a generation in a gut-lumen environment is a wet-lab question.' (comp-012 outputs/summary.md L143). DAF-on-MSU-crystal-surface accessibility is the load-bearing geometry unknown.

accessibility_priors_to_test.label: low
accessibility_priors_to_test.rationale: Conservative: most secreted DAF stays in fluid phase; MSU surface presents a hostile non-membrane substrate; engineered SCR1-4 lacks the GPI anchor that natively localises DAF to membranes.

accessibility_priors_to_test.label: medium
accessibility_priors_to_test.rationale: Moderate: soluble DAF in synovial fluid is documented (Medof 1987) and intrinsically inhibits fluid-phase convertase formation; comparable to sCR1 which retains complement-regulatory activity without its membrane anchor.

accessibility_priors_to_test.label: high
accessibility_priors_to_test.rationale: Optimistic: at high local concentrations, soluble SCR1-4 saturates surface convertases. Likely overestimates surface engagement since SCR1-4 lacks the membrane anchor that natively concentrates DAF.

daf_effective_local_concentration_assump.rationale: Per comp-030 wet-lab pre-registered prediction (§1.25 in validation-experiments.md): ≥100 mg/L DAF SCR1-4 (~3 μM = 3000 nM) at the koji secretion stage if framework α-coefficients transfer. At synovial-fluid dilution (after gut/systemic delivery) the local concentration is much lower. Use 10-500 nM range as the active-flare effective concentration prior.

msu_c3b_deposition_baseline.source: Khameneh HJ et al. 2017 PMC5253373 + Wessig 2022 PMC8924570 in vitro: MSU 20 mg/mL incubated 30 min at 37°C in human serum produces measurable C5a (nM range). Khameneh: in vivo murine i.p. 3 mg MSU produces C5a-dependent IL-1β and neutrophil recruitment.
msu_c3b_deposition_baseline.C5a_generation_rate_in_vitro_nM_per_30mi: 5-50 (order-of-magnitude estimate from Wessig 2022 Fig 3 + Khameneh 2017 Fig 6; absolute number depends on serum source and MSU load)
